texto: The baker kneads; the weaver knits;The smithy plies the sun-bright steel;The potter turns; the farmer plants;The miller grinds his dusty meal.While I my quill in trembling handPen odes to please the fickle throng;The greatest craftsman of them all, Save only she who sings my song.
explicacao: Citação de D. Alexander Neill sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “The baker kneads; the weaver knits;The smithy plies the sun-bright steel;The potter turns; the fa…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, music em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e music.
